nasb.text: Elijah said, “As the Lord of hosts lives, before whom I stand, I will surely show myself to him today.”

esv.text: And Elijah said, “As the Lord of hosts lives, before whom I stand, I will surely show myself to him today.”

cnv.text: 以利亞說：“我指著我所服事永活的萬軍之耶和華起誓，今天我必在亞哈面前出現。”

ccb.text: 以利亚说：“我事奉的是永活的万军之耶和华，我凭祂起誓，我今天必出现在亚哈面前。”
